current_reply_profiles.note: Use when the reply depends on mockup, logo, or customization follow-up material.

current_order_profiles.note: Use when line items are available, but price, total amount, and lead time still need human confirmation.

required_manual_field_details.why_required: 缺少买家公司主体，订单草稿无法交接给人工继续推进。
required_manual_field_details.collection_hint: 从客户签名、名片、邮箱域名或聊天记录中确认。

required_manual_field_details.why_required: 缺少联系人，人工回复和报价回传对象不明确。
required_manual_field_details.collection_hint: 优先从询盘落款、邮箱签名或聊天记录获取。

required_manual_field_details.why_required: 缺少正式联系邮箱，无法发送外部报价或订单草稿。
required_manual_field_details.collection_hint: 优先收集可正式回传文件的邮箱地址。

required_manual_field_details.why_required: 数量决定价格、交期和包装方案。
required_manual_field_details.collection_hint: 确认正式采购量、MOQ 或打样数量。

required_manual_field_details.why_required: 单价缺失会导致订单草稿无法形成有效报价包。
required_manual_field_details.collection_hint: 结合数量、材质、工艺和运费方案人工确认。

required_manual_field_details.why_required: 缺少总价，无法形成完整订单草稿包。
required_manual_field_details.collection_hint: 按行项目汇总或人工确认总报价。

required_manual_field_details.why_required: 预付款安排影响付款条件和订单执行节奏。
required_manual_field_details.collection_hint: 确认定金比例或预付款金额。

required_manual_field_details.why_required: 缺少交期会导致订单草稿无法形成明确承诺。
required_manual_field_details.collection_hint: 按打样、排产、出货阶段向业务或生产确认。

task5_summary.recommended_next_action: Task5 summary is temporarily degraded. Retry the order workbench after the read-side builder recovers, and keep the workflow in external draft handoff only.

shared_handoff_rules: All task3/4/5 workbenches only produce external drafts or safe draft preparation outputs and do not trigger platform write actions.
If a hard blocker exists, key manual fields are missing, or low-risk boundaries are unproven, the workflow must hand off to manual review.
Task 6 notification provider and real delivery capability are out of scope for this round.

task3_preview_summary.recommended_next_action: Submit product preview input, then complete missing manual fields before any manual publish action.

task4_preview_summary.recommended_next_action: Submit reply preview input, then complete manual review before any external send decision.

task5_preview_summary.recommended_next_action: Submit order preview input, then complete manual commercial review before any external create decision.

shared_handoff_rules: Preview center only provides input-aware preview summaries and never triggers platform-internal publish, reply, or order-create actions.
Task3/4/5 preview results must hand off to manual review whenever key manual fields, hard blockers, or incomplete business context remain.
Task 6 notification provider and real outbound delivery capability remain excluded from this round.

field_descriptions.date: 导出日期，系统会标准化到 YYYY-MM-DD。
field_descriptions.campaign_name: 计划名称；campaign_name 与 campaign_id 至少需要一个。
field_descriptions.campaign_id: 计划 ID；campaign_name 与 campaign_id 至少需要一个。
field_descriptions.ad_group_name: 单元名称，建议尽量提供。
field_descriptions.ad_group_id: 单元 ID，建议尽量提供。
field_descriptions.keyword: 关键词级输入；没有关键词维度时可留空。
field_descriptions.inquiries: 询盘量，若缺失会降低建议强度。
field_descriptions.ctr: 点击率；缺失时按 clicks / impressions 保守计算。
field_descriptions.cpc: 单次点击成本；缺失时按 spend / clicks 保守计算。
field_descriptions.conversion: 可得的转化率字段；当前不强制。
field_descriptions.inquiry_rate: 询盘率；缺失时按 inquiries / clicks 保守计算。
field_descriptions.region: 地域维度，若导出可得建议提供。
field_descriptions.device: 设备维度，若导出可得建议提供。
field_descriptions.source_file: 原始来源文件名或来源标记，用于追溯。
